check_1_discriminative.interpretation: The metric must clearly separate deliberately bad replies from real generated ones; a large positive gap means it does.

divergent_examples.note: high semantic alignment despite low word overlap — good paraphrase correctly rewarded

check_2_correlation.interpretation: Moderate positive correlation is expected (similar meaning often shares words). Divergent cases prove the alignment judge measures meaning, not string overlap.

comparisons.judge_said_policy_requires: A return requested within 30 days of the delivery date, where the item is unworn and in original condition, must be granted a full refund to the original payment method.
A full refund to the original payment method must be granted for the unworn, in original condition return requested within 30 days of delivery.

check_3_judge_trust.interpretation: Before trusting the compliance judge's scores, we verify its own reading of the policy (which rule applies) against hand-labeled ground truth it never saw. High agreement means its compliance scores are grounded in a correct reading of the document.
